name: octo-oke-pod-count
displayName: OCTO OKE — pod count over time (shop + java-apm)
description: Distinct-pod-count per service over time, bucketed at 1min. Visualises HPA scale-out (pods added) and scale-in (pods retired) for the octo-drone-shop and octo-apm-java-demo workloads during a Phase 7 stress run. Pairs with the 'OKE Autoscaling Timeline' Log Analytics dashboard.
queryString: service.namespace = 'octo_apm_demo' and (service.name = 'octo-drone-shop' or service.name = 'octo-apm-java-demo') | stats count_distinct(k8s.pod.name) as pod_count by service.name, bucket(1min) | sort +bucket

external_drilldowns.name: Langfuse / LLMetry
external_drilldowns.why: Correlate LLM trace cost/latency observed during scale-out window.

external_drilldowns.name: Arize Phoenix
external_drilldowns.why: Inspect AI evaluation runs that ran inside the stress window.

external_drilldowns.name: OpenLIT
external_drilldowns.why: OTel-native LLM telemetry view for the same time slice.
